curation_notes: The patch modifies index.php to replace two calls to rand(0, $timestamp) with randomStr(16) in the password reset activation code generation logic (lines 348-349). A new helper file lib/functions/system/function.randomStr.php is added to provide a CSPRNG-based random string generator. The vulnerability is in the main procedural flow of index.php, not inside a named function. Only 1 existing source file was modified (plus 1 new file added), so the patch is not noisy. No sibling files contain the same vulnerable pattern. The pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (CWE-330: Use of Insufficiently Random Values) is correct — the fix replaces a weak PRNG with a cryptographically secure alternative.
